about.title: About IDS
about.heading: Born from a simple ambition
about.text: The Institut für die Deutsche Sprache (IDS) was born from a simple ambition: to offer Cameroon a modern, serious German language training oriented toward international opportunities.
about.text2: Faced with growing demand for studies, vocational training, and careers in Germany, IDS was created to support students and professionals in their language and academic journey.
about.text3: Since its founding, IDS has been committed to providing quality education, innovative teaching methods, and personalized support from learning German to integrating into Germany.
about.ctaDesc: Register online in a few minutes. Our team reviews your file and contacts you quickly.

values.title: Excellence
values.desc: Superior quality education with modern and proven teaching methods.

values.title: Support
values.desc: Personalized follow-up of each student, from registration to integration in Germany.

values.title: Integrity
values.desc: Full transparency in our services, prices and commitments to students.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: Digital tools, online courses and constantly updated teaching resources.

about.addressValue: Carrefour Scalom, Africa Finance Building, Biyem-Assi, Yaoundé, Cameroon

courses.title: Our Programs
courses.subtitle: Courses adapted to every level and goal
courses.pageSubtitle: Courses adapted to every level and goal

items.desc: Language basics: alphabet, greetings, self-introduction, daily life. Ideal for absolute beginners.
Intermediate to advanced level. Free official exam preparation included from B1.
Advanced mastery. Ideal for entering a German university or accessing qualified positions.
Goethe, ÖSD, telc, ECL, TestDaF. Certified exams recognized in Germany and Europe.
Accelerated program to progress quickly. Morning, evening, weekend or online according to your availability.

levels.description: Absolute beginner level. You will learn the German alphabet, greetings, self-introduction, numbers, colors and basic expressions of daily life.
competences: Books and teaching materials provided free

levels.description: Elementary level. You will be able to communicate on familiar topics and understand isolated sentences about your immediate environment.
competences: Understand sentences on very common topics
Books and teaching materials provided free

levels.description: Intermediate level. You will understand the key points of clear communication on familiar topics at work, school and leisure.
competences: Understand the key points of clear language
Books and teaching materials provided free

levels.description: Advanced level. You will be able to understand the essential content of complex topics and express yourself spontaneously and fluently with a native speaker.
competences: Present a point of view on a current topic
Books and teaching materials provided free

levels.description: Mastery level. You will understand a wide range of long and demanding texts and express yourself spontaneously and fluently without searching for words.
competences: Use language effectively for social, academic and professional purposes
Books and teaching materials provided free

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.pageSubtitle: All answers to your questions about our courses, exams, visas and services.
faq.notFoundDesc: Our team is available to answer all your questions Monday to Saturday from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM.

items.q: Do you help with the visa process?
items.a: Yes, IDS supports its students throughout the German visa application process: file preparation, embassy appointment preparation, and guidance on the appropriate visa type for your project (student, Ausbildung, work).

items.q: Do you offer official exam preparation?
items.a: Absolutely. IDS offers preparation for Goethe, ÖSD, telc, ECL and TestDaF exams. Preparation is included free for B1, B2 and C1 levels taken at IDS.

items.q: Do you help with finding Ausbildung contracts?
items.a: Yes. IDS helps students write a German CV, a motivation letter tailored to German standards, and prepares them for interviews with employers.

items.q: Is TestDaF mandatory to study in Germany?
items.a: No. TestDaF is one option among several. Depending on the university and program, Goethe B2/C1, telc Deutsch B2/C1 Hochschule or DSH may be accepted. IDS guides you in choosing the most suitable exam for your project.

items.q: What are the advantages of taking courses at IDS?
items.a: IDS offers qualified and certified teachers, modern teaching methods, free teaching materials, WiFi access, weekly assessments, visa support, university pre-enrollment and personalized follow-up throughout.

Yes. IDS offers online courses for all levels from A1 to C1. Online courses are conducted via video conferencing platforms with the same qualified teachers and the same curriculum as in-person courses.

services.pageSubtitle: Comprehensive support, from learning German to your integration in Germany.
services.ctaText: Ready to start your journey to Germany?

items.desc: Structured courses for all levels, from absolute beginner to advanced. Group, individual, in-person or online courses.
points: Levels A1, A2, B1, B2, C1

items.desc: Intensive one-month programs to prepare you for internationally recognized exams. Free for B1, B2 and C1 levels taken at IDS.
points: Free if level taken at IDS

items.desc: Our team guides you at every step of your visa application: file preparation, consular appointment and guidance.
We help you find your university in Germany and submit your application for programs suited to your profile.
IDS supports you in finding an Ausbildung contract: CV writing, motivation letter and interview preparation.
Our all-in-one packages combine training, visa support, pre-enrollment and more at an advantageous price.

exams.pageSubtitle: Official German exams recognized in Europe and Germany. Prepare with the best.
exams.howText: Each preparation session lasts 1 month. It is designed to prepare you intensively to pass the official exam at your level with the best chances of success.
exams.freeNote: Preparation is included free for students who have completed B1, B2 or C1 levels at IDS.
exams.includedTitle: What is included in each preparation
included: Authentic documents and past exam topics

niveaux.desc: ÖSD B1 certifies an intermediate level recognized in Austria, Germany and Switzerland.
ÖSD B2 is required for access to many vocational and university programs.
ECL B1 is a European exam recognized in several countries.
ECL B2 validates an advanced level according to the Common European Framework.
Digital format on computer with German keyboard. Exam recognized in Germany and Europe.
telc Deutsch B2 is widely accepted by German universities and employers.
Goethe certification is the most internationally recognized for the German language.
Goethe B2 is required for access to many university programs in Germany.
TestDaF is the reference exam for admission to German universities. Minimum TDN 4 level generally required.

offers.pageSubtitle: Complete packages for your life project in Germany. Training, exams, visa, university — all included.
offers.externalDesc: You already have B2 level obtained elsewhere? Benefit from our support services at a reduced rate.
offers.legalNote: The final visa decision belongs solely to the German consular authorities. IDS cannot guarantee visa approval. Partial refund of the Serenity Pack is subject to strict eligibility conditions defined in the training contract.
offers.guaranteeText: In case of visa refusal by consular authorities, IDS commits to refunding 50% of the amount paid, provided all eligibility conditions are met (complete file, course attendance, official exam passed).

packs.desc: The complete solution for your study or work project in Germany. Everything included, from language training to your arrival.
All the Standard Package content, plus a partial refund guarantee in case of visa refusal under strict conditions.
